message: Hi team, I missed the weekly quiz because my wifi was down on Sunday night and the portal was closed by Monday morning. Can I get another attempt?
I submitted Assignment 2 one day late. Will my entire assignment be rejected or is there a late penalty?
My score for Question 4 seems wrong. The rubric says partial credit should be given. How can I request rechecking?
I was hospitalized during the exam window and missed the proctored exam. I have discharge papers. Please help me reschedule.
I activated the batch 3 days ago but I have not attended any live session yet. I want to withdraw. What refund will I get?
There is a student in our group who copied my code from the shared discussion and submitted it. Where do I report this?
Can you tell me exactly what answer should be written for graded quiz 5 question 3? I do not want to lose marks.
I need extra exam support because of an accessibility requirement. I can provide documents if needed.
When are the TA office hours? I have a doubt in the linear algebra week 2 content.
My laptop crashed twice while uploading the assignment and I could only submit after the deadline. Can support remove the late penalty?
I completed all modules but I still do not see the certificate. What should I check?
I attended one live session last week and now I want a refund. Is that possible?
